content.en:
"Silver Devil, this treasure still belongs to me."

Another Eternal Master appears, stopping the Silver Devil of Eternal Master.

In an unknown time and space that no one could observe, the two fought for a moment, and finally the Ancient Monument of Time and Space fell into the hands of the second Eternal Master.

"Styx, you win this time. "

The Silver Demon said angrily.

In an instant, the Silver Demon vanished.

And the eternal master known as the Stygian Sea took away the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space with one hand.

And at the moment when the Stygian Sea left, his gaze seemed to penetrate the past and the future, looking at Ye Tian and the other Legendary Realm Lords

This glance made everyone tremble.

But the next moment, the master of the Stygian Sea was gone

"Did he find us?" said Lord Longgu shuddered.

"Naturally, I found out. The Ice Lord said: "The Eternal Master can spy on the past and the future, he can naturally see that there are people in the future coming to this area, unless it is the Eternal Master, so that the other party can not see it, and we do not have such means." "

Frost-free Leader 08 said: "It's the first time I've seen two Eternal Controllers, and I can be regarded as having gained knowledge.

"I have seen the master of the Stygian Sea just now, he is one of my master's friends, and he once drank tea and played chess with my master. Lord Shaking said.

"Don't worry, the Eternal Masters will ignore us Legendary Realm Lords, leave first, and then come in from the timeline just now, and comprehend the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space again and again. "

The Ice Lord said.

Immediately, he manipulated the iris to escape out of this past time and space, enter the timeline, and then enter here from the time just now, that is, the time before the ancient desolate monument of time and space was born.

In this way, Ye Tian and the others entered this past time and space again and again, and comprehended the ancient desolate monuments of time and space again and again, as if they were constantly reincarnated, but there was one thing different, that is, their understanding was constantly deepening.

Suddenly.

The Ice Lord said: "The Kite has reached a certain level of endurance, and it must be returned, otherwise it will not be able to support us to return to the original timeline, and we will be completely annihilated in the past time and space." "

"Let's get out of here. "

Ye Tian and the other Legendary Realm lords hurriedly said

Annihilation of the past plane, it was all in vain.

The kites must take them into the future plane, even if it is a minute later, they can get out, otherwise they will never be able to get out.

Rumble!!!

Iris tears through the timeline and begins to traverse the timeline and rush back to the original time and space.

After a while, the iris's aura was very dim, and the three thousand scales on his body were cracked.

Just as it was about to collapse, everyone finally rushed back to the original timeline.

In the end, the Ice River Lord and they chose to go out 300 years after the original time and space, and they didn't dare to move forward, otherwise the kite really couldn't bear it.

"Get out!"

The kite that was about to collapse rushed out of the timeline with many Legendary Realm Lords and came to the future plane and plane, that is, 300 years later.

......

There is no holy place.

Ye Tian and the Dragon Gu Lord were silently waiting for the clone to come back one day in the future, and they didn't know how long they needed to wait.

Before you know it, 300 years have passed.

this day.

The space-time shock of the True Void Holy Land, a kite full of countless cracks came out of the timeline, fell into the True Void Holy Land, and then completely lost its energy.

At this time, the kite is almost about to be scrapped, and if you want to restore it, I am afraid that it will take a long time, and even the peak legend realm lord feels that it is a long time.

"It's only been 300 years since it came out!"

Ye Tianxia said consciously.

Then, his memories were shared with the copy body, and he knew exactly what was going on.

"It turned out that I didn't go to the future time and space, but went to the past time and space to comprehend the ancient desolate monument of time and space. "

It's a wise decision, otherwise, if you don't gain anything along the way to the future timeline, it will be a big loss.

After all, they don't know anything about the timeline, everything is unknown, and it is better to choose the past.

And this time, the harvest is very big.

The return of the kite naturally attracted the attention of many legendary realm lords of the Infinite Sea.

Naturally, they saw that the iris was almost scrapped, and they suddenly lost any interest.

For the sake of such a kite, there is almost no need to offend the True No Holy Land, and the iris can barely travel through the timeline anymore.

"I'll go first!"

The Ice Lord dropped this sentence and walked away across space.

And the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land announced that they were in retreat and penance, and they needed to digest their feelings well.If they were lucky, maybe in the near future, the True Void Realm would give birth to a Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

-

"This time I have gained a lot, although I don't completely control the space, but I control more than ninety percent, as long as I control some more other Dao, maybe I can break the shackles in one fell swoop and completely control the space. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he felt that the True Immortal Land should have the hope of giving birth to a peak Legendary Realm Lord, such as the Lord of the Underword.

The Lord of the Dark Word itself is at the extreme of the ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, and it is only one step away from breaking through to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord Realm, and he has even concocted a method of snooping and tracking for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Now, with the help of the Ancient Desolate Tablet of Time and Space, the Lord of the Dark Word has a great hope of controlling the space in one fell swoop and breaking through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord level.

If the Lord of the Word breaks through, the True Void Holy Land can be among the top forces in the Void Region, 163 is not afraid of other top forces, and the Lord of Impetity does not want to suppress the True Void Holy Land.

In the blink of an eye, six eternal epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian, True Spirit Lord, Dragon Gu Lord, and other Legendary Realm Lords held a meeting.

At the meeting, Lord Longgu said: "In recent years, many industries in the True Void Holy Land have been hit. According to the investigation, there should be the shadow of the Legendary Realm Lord, but we can't find it, but there are some things that don't need to be checked, and this matter is likely to have the instructions of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"Lord of Impermanence!"

The True Spirit Lord said.

"It should be him!" Lord Longgu nodded, "Lord Wuheng has a small heart, and it is normal for him to hit us, but he shouldn't know that the Lord of the Immortal Word has broken through."

"Lord of the Word, how long will it take to break through?" Ye Tian asked.

The True Spirit Lord said, "I chatted with the Lord of the Word for a few words, she is now attacking with all her strength, and it will take about a few eternity epochs to completely break through." "

"I propose to keep a low profile during this time, bear with me, and wait for the Lord of the Word to break through to the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord before counterattacking. Ye Tian proposed.

"Agreed!"

"Agreed!"

"Agreed!"

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords nodded. _
